entry_rules.reading: The next refresh should open as a new criteria-first batch rather than by reopening already checked local substrate replay.
The new refresh should target true carry rows first and clean persistence rows second, while keeping the opening class frozen.
The refresh should not solve the bottleneck by relabeling or by returning to the already exhausted local q2/A hunt zone.
Catalyst context can support the next refresh design, but it should not replace the main carry-row-diversity objective.

interpretation: The next V1.2 refresh should start from the current training sample gap, not from whichever local substrate was most recently checked.
That means true carry rows remain the primary target, clean persistence rows remain the secondary target, and opening-led clone expansion remains out of scope.
So the next healthy move is to freeze a new v5 refresh entry before any new manifest drafting begins.
